record.field: WhatsApp sent when a reservation (folio) is confirmed.

<t t-set="reservations" t-value="object.reservation_ids.filtered_domain([('state', '!=', 'cancel')])"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="[]"/><t t-foreach="reservations" t-as="reservation"><t t-set="prefix" t-value="(str(reservation_index + 1) + '▪️ ') if len(reservations) > 1 else '▪️ '"/><t t-set="room_name" t-value="reservation.room_type_id and reservation.room_type_id.name or ''"/><t t-set="checkin_txt" t-value="reservation.checkin and reservation.checkin.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="checkout_txt" t-value="reservation.checkout and reservation.checkout.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="chunks + [(prefix + room_name + ' → ' + checkin_txt + ' to ' + checkout_txt).strip()]"/></t><t t-out="' | '.join(chunks)"/>
WhatsApp sent when a reservation (folio) is modified.

<t t-set="reservations" t-value="object.reservation_ids.filtered_domain([('state', '!=', 'cancel')])"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="[]"/><t t-foreach="reservations" t-as="reservation"><t t-set="prefix" t-value="(str(reservation_index + 1) + '▪️ ') if len(reservations) > 1 else '▪️ '"/><t t-set="room_name" t-value="reservation.room_type_id and reservation.room_type_id.name or ''"/><t t-set="checkin_txt" t-value="reservation.checkin and reservation.checkin.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="checkout_txt" t-value="reservation.checkout and reservation.checkout.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="chunks + [(prefix + room_name + ' → ' + checkin_txt + ' to ' + checkout_txt).strip()]"/></t><t t-out="' | '.join(chunks)"/>
WhatsApp sent when a reservation (folio) is cancelled.

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. Your reservation {{ reservation_locator }} at {{ hotel_name }} has been cancelled.
If you need anything else, please let us know.
Initial reminder for online check-in and pending payment.

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. Your arrival at {{ hotel_name }} is on {{ checkin_date }}.
Complete your online check-in and pending payment to receive your arrival information.
Urgent reminder for online check-in and pending payment.

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. We look forward to welcoming you tomorrow at {{ hotel_name }}.
To prepare for your arrival, we need you to complete your online check-in and the pending payment to send you all the necessary information.

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. Your arrival at {{ hotel_name }} is on {{ checkin_date }}.
Please complete your online check-in so we can send you all the necessary information.

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. We look forward to welcoming you tomorrow at {{ hotel_name }}.
Please complete your online check-in before arrival.
Initial reminder for pending reservation payment.

{{ (format_amount(object.pending_amount or 0.0, object.currency_id).replace((object.currency_id and (object.currency_id.symbol or '')) or '', '').replace((object.currency_id and (object.currency_id.name or '')) or '', '').replace('\xa0', ' ').strip()) if object.currency_id else ('%.2f' % (object.pending_amount or 0.0)) }}
Urgent reminder for pending reservation payment.

{{ (format_amount(object.pending_amount or 0.0, object.currency_id).replace((object.currency_id and (object.currency_id.symbol or '')) or '', '').replace((object.currency_id and (object.currency_id.name or '')) or '', '').replace('\xa0', ' ').strip()) if object.currency_id else ('%.2f' % (object.pending_amount or 0.0)) }}

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. We look forward to welcoming you tomorrow at {{ hotel_name }}.
Before your arrival, we need you to complete the outstanding payment for reservation {{ reservation_locator }} so we can send you all the information.
Amount due: {{ amount_due }} {{ currency }}
Thank you very much.
Pre-arrival information once check-in/payment status allows sending.

{{ (object.pms_property_id.main_door_property if 'main_door_property' in object.pms_property_id._fields else False) or (object.pms_property_id.property_access_code if 'property_access_code' in object.pms_property_id._fields else False) or '' }}

{{ (object.custom_info_arrival if 'custom_info_arrival' in object._fields else False) or (object.custom_info_arrival_block if 'custom_info_arrival_block' in object._fields else False) or (object.pms_property_id.custom_info_arrival if 'custom_info_arrival' in object.pms_property_id._fields else False) or (object.pms_property_id.custom_info_arrival_block if 'custom_info_arrival_block' in object.pms_property_id._fields else False) or '' }}

Hello, {{ buyer_name }}. Everything is ready for your arrival at {{ hotel_name }}.
📍 Directions: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ojESiJH7pWAPbFci9
⏰ Check-in from 14:00. Front desk open until 22:00.
If you arrive outside these hours, you can access via virtual reception.
🚪 Number to open the main entrance door: {{ main_door_property }}
{{ custom_info_arrival }}
If you need anything, such as parking information, we'll be happy to help.
Critical reactivation asking the guest for confirmation and context.
Custom question/context to be injected before manual send.

<t t-set="reservations" t-value="object.reservation_ids.filtered_domain([('state', '!=', 'cancel')])"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="[]"/><t t-foreach="reservations" t-as="reservation"><t t-set="prefix" t-value="(str(reservation_index + 1) + '▪️ ') if len(reservations) > 1 else '▪️ '"/><t t-set="room_name" t-value="reservation.room_type_id and reservation.room_type_id.name or ''"/><t t-set="checkin_txt" t-value="reservation.checkin and reservation.checkin.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="checkout_txt" t-value="reservation.checkout and reservation.checkout.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="chunks + [(prefix + room_name + ' → ' + checkin_txt + ' al ' + checkout_txt).strip()]"/></t><t t-out="' | '.join(chunks)"/>

<t t-set="reservations" t-value="object.reservation_ids.filtered_domain([('state', '!=', 'cancel')])"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="[]"/><t t-foreach="reservations" t-as="reservation"><t t-set="prefix" t-value="(str(reservation_index + 1) + '▪️ ') if len(reservations) > 1 else '▪️ '"/><t t-set="room_name" t-value="reservation.room_type_id and reservation.room_type_id.name or ''"/><t t-set="checkin_txt" t-value="reservation.checkin and reservation.checkin.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="checkout_txt" t-value="reservation.checkout and reservation.checkout.strftime('%d/%m') or ''"/><t t-set="chunks" t-value="chunks + [(prefix + room_name + ' → ' + checkin_txt + ' al ' + checkout_txt).strip()]"/></t><t t-out="' | '.join(chunks)"/>

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Tu reserva {{ reservation_locator }} en {{ hotel_name }} ha sido cancelada.
Quedamos a tu disposición si necesitas algo más.

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Te esperamos en {{ hotel_name }} el {{ checkin_date }}.
Completa el check-in online y el pago pendiente para recibir la información de llegada.

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Mañana te esperamos en {{ hotel_name }}.
Para tu llegada, necesitamos que completes el check-in online y el pago pendiente de la reserva. Así podremos enviarte toda la información.

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Tu llegada a {{ hotel_name }} es el {{ checkin_date }}.
Por favor, completa el check-in online para que podamos enviarte toda la información necesaria.

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Mañana te esperamos en {{ hotel_name }}.
Para tu llegada, necesitamos que completes el check-in online. Así podremos enviarte toda la información.

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Mañana te esperamos en {{ hotel_name }}.
Antes de tu llegada, necesitamos que completes el pago pendiente de la reserva {{ reservation_locator }} para enviarte toda la información.
Importe pendiente: {{ amount_due }} {{ currency }}
Muchas gracias.

Hola, {{ buyer_name }}. Todo está listo para tu llegada a {{ hotel_name }}.
📍 Cómo llegar: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ojESiJH7pWAPbFci9
⏰ Check-in desde las 14:00 h. Recepción presencial hasta las 22:00 h.
Si llegas fuera de este horario, podrás acceder mediante recepción virtual.
🚪 Número para abrir la puerta principal: {{ main_door_property }}
{{ custom_info_arrival }}
Si necesitas algo, como información de parking, estaremos encantados de ayudarte.
WhatsApp alert sent to hotel staff when a guest conversation is escalated and no one attends within the configured timeout.
